summary: All 6 Creator Tools issues have been verified as FIXED. Backend API tests: 19/19 passed (100%). UI tests: All tabs working correctly. Calendar shows inspirational tips, Carousel generates real content, Hashtags displays 15 tags with copy, Thumbnails shows 5 categories, Trending randomizes on refresh, Convert tab all 4 buttons functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Calendar now properly shows inspirationalTip field for each day with motivational quotes
Carousel content uses real templates based on niche (productivity, success, health, general)
Trending topics properly randomize on refresh using random.shuffle()
Convert tab handlers properly call API endpoints with use_recent=true fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Creator Tools issues verified fixed. Backend tests cover Calendar inspirational tips, Carousel real content, Hashtags 15 tags, Thumbnails 5 categories, Trending randomization, and Convert endpoints. UI tests confirm all functionality working in browser.

features_tested.thumbnails_categories: PASS - Shows 5 categories: clickbait, informative, emotional, curiosity, action
features_tested.trending_randomization: PASS - Topics order changes on refresh button click
